scripts.summary: Manager tool for selecting AgencyZoom tags hidden from producer views.
scripts.details: Use this on manager workstations to maintain the hidden-tag list for AgencyZoom cards. It has no employee position assignment and will not show on the public installer page unless assigned to PRODUCER, CSR, or SDR.

scripts.summary: Cleans AgencyZoom location fields and forces USA in country dropdowns.
scripts.details: Removes same-as-mailing-address boxes and auto-selects USA in country dropdowns on AgencyZoom pages where those location controls appear.

scripts.summary: Adds call, SMS, email, and note actions to AgencyZoom pipeline views.
scripts.details: Adds AgencyZoom-style action icons to lead pipeline cards and task modals. Phone calls route through RingCentral; notes, SMS, and email actions open the matching AgencyZoom workflows.

scripts.summary: Hides manager-selected AgencyZoom card tags from producer views.
scripts.details: Runs on producer machines. It reads the manager-selected hidden-tag list, caches it locally, and hides matching AgencyZoom card tags as cards render.

scripts.summary: Generates a downloadable PDF from the CFP quick quote platform.
scripts.details: Adds a PDF generation workflow to the CFP quick quote platform so staff can produce a downloadable quote document from the quote screen.

scripts.summary: Adds property helper buttons to PolicyCenter.
scripts.details: Adds Reconstruction Calculator, Zillow, and Google Maps buttons to PolicyCenter or Guidewire pages to speed up property lookup and quoting work.

scripts.summary: Adds pickup and hangup counters to Ricochet.
scripts.details: Adds daily Pick Ups and Hang Ups counters to Ricochet and can send the count/report payload to the configured webhook.

scripts.summary: Reminds Ricochet SDRs when a lead needs voicemail handling.
scripts.details: Watches Ricochet lead activity and reminds SDRs when it is time to leave a voicemail, helping keep follow-up timing consistent.

excludedMainScripts.reason: Composer will be worked on later.
Standalone active script intentionally has no updater.
Standalone active script intentionally has no updater.
